reviews.comment:
Excelente atención siempre, hacen el mejor submarino! En ninguna Ypf que estuve lo hacen como ellos, no se por que. lugar muy cómodo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service as always, they make the best submarine sandwich! I haven't been to any other YPF station that makes one as good as they do, I don't know why. Very comfortable place.
